url: Bodo Alphabets – Devanagari Alphabets

rows: Bodo uses the Devanagari alphabet in schools
Vowels are written with clear height and length
Practice writing अ आ इ ई

title: Bodo Alphabets – Devanagari Alphabets

url: Vowels, Consonants in Bodo and their pronunciation

rows: Consonants are called by their place of articulation
Velar क ख ग घ ङ
Palatal च छ ज झ ञ
Retroflex ट ठ ड ढ ण
Dental त थ द ध न
Labial प फ ब भ म
Aspirated letters need a puff of air
Retroflex ट sounds farther back than त

title: Vowels, Consonants in Bodo and their pronunciation

url: Bodo Barakhadi: Symbols for vowels with consonants

rows: Each consonant has a full vowel row
Write from memory: च चा चि…

title: Bodo Barakhadi: Symbols for vowels with consonants

url: Frequently faced pronunciation problems in Bodo (Devanagari)

rows: Aspiration: ख is not k + h as in English
Retroflex ट is made with the tongue curled back
Dental त touches near the teeth
Do not mix up श and ष
अनुस्वार follows the vowel in the syllable
Avoid English r for Bodo र
Practice pairs: प फ, ब भ
Stress usually falls on the first heavy syllable
Nasal sounds are light, not full English n
Read: आं दै जादों (I am eating)
Clear sounds matter more than speed

title: Frequently faced pronunciation problems in Bodo (Devanagari)

url: Pronunciation of Anusvar (अनुस्वार) in Bodo

rows: Anusvār (ं) sounds like the class nasal
Before क ख ग घ → ङ्
Before च छ ज झ → ञ्
Before ट ठ ड ढ → ण्
Before त थ द ध → न्
Before प फ ब भ → म्
In handwriting the dot may be small

title: Pronunciation of Anusvar (अनुस्वार) in Bodo

url: Combining consonants in Bodo (बर' जोडाक्षरे)

rows: Conjuncts join consonants without a vowel between
Split conjuncts from left to right
Release each part of the cluster clearly

title: Combining consonants in Bodo (बर' जोडाक्षरे)

url: Combining consonants with र (r) – Bodo जोडाक्षरे Part 2

rows: र् in प्र त्र क्र comes after the first part
When र is first: र्क र्ग
Do not add a vowel after half-र

title: Combining consonants with र (r) – Bodo जोडाक्षरे Part 2

url: Combining consonants with ह (h) – Bodo जोडाक्षरे Part 3

rows: क्ष is taught as one letter
ज्ञ is taught as one letter
ह at word end is short

title: Combining consonants with ह (h) – Bodo जोडाक्षरे Part 3

Print and handwriting shapes may differ

url: Exceptional Verbs in Bodo which change in past tense form

rows: बो तों दिं → बो जा दं
bo toṅ diṅ → bo jā dong
बो हो दिं → बो हो दं
bo ho diṅ → bo ho dong
बो ला दिं → बो ला दं
bo lā diṅ → bo lā dong
बो बोल दिं → बो बोल दं
bo bol diṅ → bo bol dong
बो नेउ दिं → बो नेउ दं
bo neu diṅ → bo neu dong
बो बैठ दिं → बो बैठ दं
bo baiṭh diṅ → bo baiṭh dong
बो विन दिं → बो विन दं
bo vin diṅ → bo vin dong
आँ तों दों → आँ जा दं
āṅ toṅ doṅ → āṅ jā dong
आँ जा दों → आँ खा दं
āṅ jā doṅ → āṅ khā dong
noṅ nuṅ diṅ → noṅ nuṅ dong
जिंग विन दों → जिंग विन दं
jiṅ vin doṅ → jiṅ vin dong
biphāṅ toṅ diṅ → biphāṅ jā dong
बो सा दिं → बो सा दं
bo sā diṅ → bo sā dong
बि पद दिं → बि पद दं
bi pad diṅ → bi pad dong
बो दौड़ दिं → बो दौड़ दं
bo dauṛ diṅ → bo dauṛ dong
बो डिग दिं → बो डिग दं
bo ḍig diṅ → bo ḍig dong
बो मोन दिं → बो मोन दं
bo mon diṅ → bo mon dong
आँ ला दों → आँ ला दं
āṅ lā doṅ → āṅ lā dong
नों गोम दिं → नों गोम दं
noṅ gom diṅ → noṅ gom dong

It is going to rain today
I am going to try my best
What are you going to do?

The bus is going to start
I am going to buy vegetables
She is going to cook rice
We are going to meet at the temple
He is not going to tell lies
बो मिथिखौ नङा बोल ला दिं
bo mithikhau naṅā bol lā diṅ

url: Sentence using "Used to" phrase in Bodo

rows: I used to play in this street
He used to walk every morning
We used to live in the village
They used to visit us often
I used to fear the dark
Mother used to wake up early
He used to work in the fields
It used to be very cold here
I used to read the newspaper
The shop used to open late
I used to go by bus
We used to bathe in the river

title: Sentence using "Used to" phrase in Bodo

url: Sentence using "Used to" phrase – old style in Bodo

rows: Long ago I used to study here
In those days he used to travel on foot
People used to respect elders more
We used to sit under this tree
जिंग निं गोजो थालाव बैठ दंगो
jiṅ nin gojo thālāw baiṭh daṅgo
The fair used to come every year
She used to wear a white suit
They used to farm this land
I used to know him since childhood
We used to fetch water from the well
जिंग कुइ निफ्राय दै ला दंगो
jiṅ kui niphrāy dai lā daṅgo
The teacher used to be strict
I used to listen to the radio
He used to return before sunset
बो सुर डुब सों फिन दंगो
bo sur ḍub soṅ phin daṅgo
We used to share one room
Food used to taste different then

title: Sentence using "Used to" phrase – old style in Bodo

url: Sentence using "If-Then" in Bodo

rows: If it rains, I will stay home
जे दै थां आँ गोर थांगो
je dai thāṅ āṅ gor thāṅgo
If you come, we will go together
जे नों विन जिंग गोथो तोंगो
je noṅ vin jiṅ gotho toṅgo
If he studies, he will pass
जे बो पद पास ला दिं
je bo pad pās lā diṅ
If she calls, tell her I am busy
जे बि फोन ला आँ ब्यस्त दं
je bi fon lā āṅ byast dong
If we leave now, we will be on time
जे जिंग दा चल वक्ताव फैगो
je jiṅ dā cal vaktāw phaigo
If the bus is late, take a taxi
If you need help, ask me
If I had money, I would buy a house
जे आँनि पैसा गोर खरिद ला दों
je āṅni paisā gor kharid lā doṅ
If they agree, start the work
जे बिफां राजि काम सुरु हो
je biphāṅ rāji kām suru ho
If you eat too much, you will feel ill
जे नों बाहागो जा बिमार ला दिं
je noṅ bāhāgo jā bimār lā diṅ
If the road is bad, drive slowly
If winter comes, wear warm clothes
If you lie, nobody will trust you
जे नों मिथिखौ बोल गोथो भरोसा नङा
je noṅ mithikhau bol gotho bharosā naṅā
If I see him, I will inform you
जे आँ बिनि नेउ नेंफांनि बोलगो
je āṅ bini neu nenphāṅni bolgo
If the shop is closed, come tomorrow
If we work hard, we will succeed

je lā doṅ āṅ madad ho
We would sit under this tree
जिंग निं गोजो थालाव बैठ दंगो
jiṅ nin gojo thālāw baiṭh daṅgo
They would play in the street
Would you mind closing the door?
बो कदे मिथिखौ नङा बोल दंगो
bo kade mithikhau naṅā bol daṅgo
I would feel scared at night

title: Sentences using "would" in Bodo

url: "To Understand" & "To come to know" in Bodo

rows: She does not understand Bodo well
I came to know the news yesterday
How did you come to know?
We came to know through TV
He came to know the truth later
I could not understand his accent
Let me know if you understand
They came to know each other at college

title: "To Understand" & "To come to know" in Bodo

url: Add a question tag in Bodo

rows: He is at home, isn't he?
बि गाडि चल ला दिं, नामा?
bi gāḍi cal lā diṅ, nāmā?
We will go tomorrow, won't we?
It is cold today, isn't it?
You don't eat meat, do you?
नों मास नङा जा दिं, नामा?
noṅ mās naṅā jā diṅ, nāmā?
They haven't come yet, have they?
This is your book, isn't it?
He is your brother, isn't he?

title: Add a question tag in Bodo

url: Using verb "To remember" in Bodo

rows: I forgot where I kept the keys
नों आँनि याद ला दिं नामा?
noṅ āṅni yād lā diṅ nāmā?
जिंग जिंनि मास्तार याद ला दों
jiṅ jiṅni māstār yād lā doṅ
I will never forget this help
आँ निं मदद कदे गोम नङागो
āṅ nin madad kade gom naṅāgo
She forgot to bring the file
आँ बिनि दा नेउ याद दं
āṅ bini dā neu yād dong

title: Using verb "To remember" in Bodo

url: Using "To Want"/"To Need" with other verbs in Bodo

rows: We want to watch the match
He wants to buy a phone
Do you want to come along?
नों सों विन ला दिं नामा?
noṅ soṅ vin lā diṅ nāmā?
She wants to help her mother
बि बिनि आमानि मदद ला दिं
bi bini āmāni madad lā diṅ
He wants to leave the job
I want to drink cold water
आँ थंड दै नुं ला दों
āṅ thaṇḍ dai nuṅ lā doṅ
She wants to become a nurse
I want to tell you something
आँ नोंनि गोथो बोल ला दों
āṅ noṅni gotho bol lā doṅ

title: Using "To Want"/"To Need" with other verbs in Bodo

url: Using "To Want" with other person in Bodo

rows: We want you to be careful
जिंग नोंनि सावधान थां ला दों
jiṅ noṅni sāvadhān thāṅ lā doṅ
He wants his son to work hard
बो बिनि मुसानि मेहनत ला दिं
bo bini musāni mehnat lā diṅ
I don't want them to fight
आँ बिफां लडाइ नङा ला दों
āṅ biphāṅ laḍāi naṅā lā doṅ
The teacher wants students to be quiet
मास्तार सोरफोर थांथि थां ला दिं
māstār sorphor thāṃthi thāṅ lā diṅ
She wants the doctor to come
We want the government to help
He wants his friend to leave
बो बिनि दोस्त चल ला दिं
bo bini dost cal lā diṅ
Do you want me to call?
नों आँ फोन ला दिं नामा?
noṅ āṅ fon lā diṅ nāmā?
I want her to feel safe
आँ बिनि सुरक्षित थां ला दों
āṅ bini surakṣit thāṅ lā doṅ
She wants everyone to be happy
बि गोथो खुसि थां ला दिं
bi gotho khusi thāṅ lā diṅ

title: Using "To Want" with other person in Bodo

url: Using phrase "supposed to" in Bodo

rows: I am supposed to reach by nine
आँ नौ वजाव फै ला दों
āṅ nau vajāw phai lā doṅ
You are supposed to wear uniform
He is supposed to pay today
We are supposed to attend the meeting
The train is supposed to arrive now
I was supposed to call yesterday
Students are supposed to bring books
You were supposed to inform me
The shop is supposed to open at ten
दुकान दस वजे खोल ला दं
dukān das vaje khol lā dong
I am not supposed to tell anyone
They are supposed to report early
What am I supposed to do?
The medicine is supposed to work fast
We were supposed to meet at six
He is supposed to be the chief guest
बो मुख्य मेहमान हो ला दिं
bo mukhya mehmān ho lā diṅ

title: Using phrase "supposed to" in Bodo

āṅ dai thāṅ cal lā doṅ

bi sā soṅ pad lā diṅ

He likes to fix old things
बो गोजोन गुदि ठिक ला दिं
bo gojon gudi ṭhik lā diṅ

बिफां ट्रेन सों सफर ला दिं
biphāṅ ṭren soṅ safar lā diṅ

āṅ garam dūdh nuṅ lā doṅ

bi safāi soṅ kapaṛ pin lā diṅ

url: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 1 (And, But, Because, So, That, Although, Though, Still, Yet)

rows: आँ विन बो चल जाब दं
āṅ vin bo cal jāb dong
He said that he will come
बो बोल दं बो विन ला दंगोन
bo bol dong bo vin lā dangona
Although it was late, we went
देर दं थां जिंग जा दं
der dong thāṅ jiṅ jā dong
Because of rain the match stopped
दै बिफिन मेच रुक जाब दं
dai bifin mec ruk jāb dong
I think that it is true
āṅ soloṅ lā doṅ nin soloṅ dong
He ran but missed the bus
बो दौड बस छुट जाब दं
bo dauḍ bas chuṭ jāb dong

title: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 1 (And, But, Because, So, That, Although, Though, Still, Yet)

url: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 2 (As, Or, Neither, Nor, If, in case, provided)

rows: I have neither time nor money
If it rains, we will stay
जे दै थां जिंग थां ला दों
je dai thāṅ jiṅ thāṅ lā doṅ
nā nin thāṅ nā nin thāṅ
As long as you are honest
In case of emergency call police

title: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 2 (As, Or, Neither, Nor, If, in case, provided)

url: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 3 (After, then, As far as, As long as, As if)

rows: As long as you stay, I am happy
नों थां दं थां आँ खुश दों
noṅ thāṅ dong thāṅ āṅ khush doṅ
As far as the eye can see
अख नुंथै वेख ला दं थां
akh nunthai vekh lā dong thāṅ
As long as there is life
He looked as if he was afraid
As far as this matter goes
She acted as if she knew
After the rain, the air was fresh

title: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 3 (After, then, As far as, As long as, As if)

url: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 4 (As Soon as, Once, Rather Than, Instead of, So that)

rows: As soon as I reached, it rained
Once you try, you will like it
इ बार कोशिश खालाम फिन पसंद जा
i bār koshish khālam phin pasand jā
Instead of bus, take a train
As soon as the bell rang, class started
घंटि बज फिन क्लास सुरु दं
ghaṇṭi baja phin klās suru dong
Once I know, I will tell
आँ मोन ला दों फिन दसों
āṅ mon lā doṅ phin dasoṅ
As soon as he saw me, he smiled
बो आँ वेख फिन मुस्कान खालाम
bo āṅ vekh phin muskān khālam
Once the sun sets, come back
Speak clearly so that all understand
साफ बोल तां जे मानसिफोर सोंलों
sāph bol tāṅ je mānasiaphor soloṅ

title: Conjunctions in Bodo – Part 4 (As Soon as, Once, Rather Than, Instead of, So that)

url: List of Conjunctions in Bodo

rows: That — I think that it is true
soloṅ — āṅ soloṅ nin soloṅ dong
फिन — आँ फिन उमेद ला दों
phin — āṅ phin umed lā doṅ
Neither… nor — neither he nor she

title: List of Conjunctions in Bodo

url: Combining sentences in Bodo

rows: The sun rose. The birds sang.
We combined: The sun rose and the birds sang.
सुरज उग आरो सिमफोरनि गान दं।
suraj uga āro simphorani gān dong.
Combined: Tired from work, he slept.
Combined: Because it rained, we stayed home.
She opened the book. She began to read.
बिनि पुस्तक खोल। पड सुरु खालाम।
bini pustak khol. paḍ suru khālam.
Combined: Opening the book, she began to read.
पुस्तक खोल के बिनि पड सुरु खालाम।
pustak khol ke bini paḍ suru khālam.
Combined: When the train arrived, we boarded.
बो मेहनत खालाम। बो पास जा।
bo mehanat khālam. bo pās jā.
Combined: Having studied hard, he passed.
मेहनत खालाम के बो पास जा।
mehanat khālam ke bo pās jā.
Combined: The shop was closed, so we returned.
दुकान बन्द दं बाहागो जिंग मुड विन।
dukān band dong bāhāgo jiṅ muḍ vin.
आँ बो वेख। आँ खुर हल।
āṅ bo vekh. āṅ khur hal.
बो वेख के आँ खुर हल।
bo vekh ke āṅ khur hal.

title: Combining sentences in Bodo

url: Idioms and Phrases in Bodo

rows: To kill two birds with one stone
All that glitters is not gold
To bite the hand that feeds

jo roṭi de bini khur kāṭ
The early bird catches the worm

jo daikho uṭh bo phāydā lā
Every cloud has a silver lining
To hit the nail on the head
Between the devil and the deep sea

url: Sentences using "If-Then" Style 2 in Bodo

rows: If you hurry, you will catch the bus
जे नों दैखो खालाम बस फड ला दिं
je noṅ daikho khālam bas phaḍ lā diṅ
If I were rich, I would help more
जे आँ धन दों ज्यादा मदद खालाम
je āṅ dhan doṅ zyādā madad khālam
Unless you try, you won't learn
Provided you pay, you can take it
जे नों भर दे ला ला दिं
je noṅ bhar de lā lā diṅ
If it had rained, crops would have grown
जे दै थां हौ फसल बाह दं
je dai thāṅ hau phasal bāh dong
If she had called, I would have come
जे बिनि फोन खालाम आँ विन हौ
je bini fon khālam āṅ vin hau
If they agree, the deal is done
If not today, then tomorrow for sure
If you eat less spice, your health will be better
जे कम मिर्च जा सेहत गोजो
je kam mirc jā sehat gojo
Were I you, I would not wait
जे आँ नों दों थां नङा
je āṅ noṅ doṅ thāṅ naṅā
If the road is clear, we will reach fast
If you had told me, I would have helped
जे नों दस दे आँ मदद खालाम
je noṅ das de āṅ madad khālam
If winter sets in, wear warm clothes
जे थंड पै जा गरम कपड पा
je thaṇḍ pai jā garam kapaḍ pā
If you don't ask, you won't get
If everyone cooperates, work finishes fast
जे मानसिफोर मिल कम दैखो मुक
je mānasiaphor mil kam daikho muk
जे बिजली चम गोर अन्दर थां
je bijalī cama gor andar thāṅ

rows: I need a room for two nights

āṅnai nai rāt lām rum lām dong
आँ होर तौलिया ला दों नामा?
āṅ hor tauliyā lā doṅ nāmā?

The lift is on the left
I want to extend one day
आँ गोथो दिन होर थां ला दों
āṅ gotho din hor thāṅ lā doṅ

rows: तुफान आ ला दं; अन्दर थां
tuphān ā lā dong; andar thāṅ

url: Simple Bodo conversation – Rickshaw/Taxi driver

rows: How much to the railway station?
Drop me at the main road
Can you help with the bags?
नों बेग चुक ला दिं नामा?
noṅ beg cuk lā diṅ nāmā?
Wait two minutes, I am coming
नै मिनट थां हो, आँ विन दों
nai minaṭ thāṅ ho, āṅ vin doṅ
निं ओला उबर मिल दं नामा?
nin olā ubar mil dong nāmā?
Thank you; here is your money

We follow agile in our team

jiṅ jiṅni ṭim ejāilāw kām doṅ

rows: आँ हर हफ्ता निं ला दों

url: Simple Bodo Conversation – Doctor-Patient

rows: Doctor, I have fever since yesterday
डाक्टर, मैया दिन निफ्राय आँनि बुखार दं
ḍākṭar, maiyā din niphrāy āṅni bukhār dong
Take this medicine twice a day
निं दवाई दिनि नै वार ला
nin davāī dini nai vār lā
The pain is in the chest
Emergency is on the ground floor
आँ दा ठिक महसुस ला दों
āṅ dā ṭhik mahasus lā doṅ

title: Simple Bodo Conversation – Doctor-Patient

url: Simple Bodo Conversation – Teacher & Students

rows: आँ क्लासाव विन ला दों नामा?
āṅ klāsāw vin lā doṅ nāmā?
नों निं सवाल सोंलों ला दिं नामा?
noṅ nin savāl soloṅ lā diṅ nāmā?
I will submit the project online
आँ सवाल फुं ला दों नामा?
āṅ savāl phuṅ lā doṅ nāmā?
We will have a quiz today

title: Simple Bodo Conversation – Teacher & Students

url: Simple Bodo conversation – Informal phone conversation

rows: She is not at home right now
आँ खोर खो ला दों नामा?
āṅ khor kho lā doṅ nāmā?
Tell her to call me back
बिनि आँखौ फिन फोन हो बोल
bini āṅkhau phin fon ho bol
नों आँनि नुंथ ला दिं नामा?
noṅ āṅni nunth lā diṅ nāmā?
I'll call again in five minutes
आँ बा मिनट फिन फोन खालामों
āṅ bā minaṭ phin fon khālamoṅ
आँ गारि चला दों; फिन फोन खालाम
āṅ gāri calā doṅ; phin fon khālam

title: Simple Bodo conversation – Informal phone conversation

rows: How much per kilo for tomatoes?

regular grāhak lām chuṭ dong nāmā?
Thank you, see you next week

url: Asking address in Bodo

rows: Excuse me, where is this lane?
How far is the post office?
उं मानसिखौ फुं; बिफां मोन दं
uṅ mānasi khau phuṅ; biphāṅ mon dong
Near the temple, not the mosque
नों थांहो लिर ला दिं नामा?
noṅ thāṃho lir lā diṅ nāmā?
I will put it in maps
Landmark is the big banyan tree
Is this the correct pin code?

title: Asking address in Bodo

url: I Love you in Bodo – Proposing someone

rows: You mean a lot to me
I want to spend time with you
आँ नोंजों सम गज्जा ला दों
āṅ noṅjoṃ sam gajjā lā doṅ
आँ नोंखौ गोर थां टुर ला दों नामा?
āṅ noṅkhau gor thāṅ ṭur lā doṅ nāmā?
आँ नोंनि भाव मान ला दों
āṅ noṅni bhāv mān lā doṅ
जिंग गोथो गोबो ला दों नामा?
jiṅ gotho gobo lā doṅ nāmā?
I promise to care for you
आँ नोंनि ख्याल राखनाय वादा ला दों
āṅ noṅni khyāl rākhanāy vādā lā doṅ
Whatever you decide, I respect it
नों फैसला खालाम के आँ मान ला दों
noṅ phaislā khālam ke āṅ mān lā doṅ

title: I Love you in Bodo – Proposing someone

url: Simple Bodo Conversation – Interview

rows: Why do you want this job?
आँ फिन दान जॉइन ला दों
āṅ phin dān join lā doṅ
Where do you see yourself in five years?
बा बोसोर फिन नों आँनि कुथां नेउ?
bā bosor phin noṅ āṅni kuthāṅ neu?
जिंनि लाम मोनो सवाल दं नामा?
jiṅni lām mono savāl dong nāmā?
I will send documents by email
I am comfortable with Bodo and Hindi
आँ बोडो आरो हिन्दि थां सहज दों
āṅ boḍo āro hindi thāṅ sahaj doṅ
When can I expect the result?
Goodbye; hope to work with you

Keep the keys on the table
